entities.name: GROUNDNUT

entities.description: The necrotrophic pathogen that causes stem rot in groundnut

entities.description: The yield of groundnut pods, which is reduced by stem rot

entities.description: A screening method used to assess disease reaction in groundnut genotypes

entities.description: A controlled screening method used to assess disease reaction
